title: Precooked by Juix
description: Datapack for auto-cooking raw items looted
body:
# ℹ️ Precooked By Juix The Precooked pack automatically precooks a large number of items in your Minecraft game, including ores, meat and fish. Useful for minigames or events with limited time, when resources need to be collected quickly ! You also get XP when this auto-cooking process is activated, like using a furnace.

![Ores mined & Animals killed](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c98fe56f6cd45307205983746d3f07eaed0ccab3.webp)
# 🆕 Options - **_/function datapack:precooked_datapack/toggle_ores_smelting_** - To disable ores auto-smelting (v1.3+) - **_/function datapack:precooked_datapack/toggle_food_cooking_** - To disable food auto-cooking (v1.3+)
# 🪳 Known issues - No known issue for now Quick report - https://juixcode.github.io/contact
# 🔃 Ask for a version You can **report a bug** or ask me to **update one of my pack to a specific version**, using one of these contact methods : - Quick message - https://juixcode.github.io/contact - My mail - juixcontact@gmail.com - The Discord server - clikc-here-to-join
# ❤️ Donations If you like my packs, you can tip me on my Ko-Fi page. Thank you so much if you do !
https://ko-fi.com/juixcode
